pr.title: Build ReZilient mobile-first recovery ecosystem
pr.body: ## Summary - Introduces a canonical mobile-first ReZilient home experience covering role onboarding, weekly itinerary, mission board, roadmap, four pillars, Ask AI, S.E.E. planner preview, resource map, accountability, support circle, Ah Ha Moment, audio vault, veteran hub, profile, and counselor dashboard surfaces. - Reworks role selection for the requested 10 user types with role-specific permissions and dashboards. - Adds a dedicated Recovery Audio Vault page and expands the global panic/reset flow. - Adds Base44 entity schemas for the ReZilient product data model, including users, check-ins, goals, tasks, roadmaps, resources, support contacts, audio, milestones, notifications, risk scores, and AI recommendations. ## Verification - `npm run build` passes. Base44 reports proxy not enabled because `VITE_BASE44_APP_BASE_URL` is not set in this workspace. - `npx eslint src/pages/ReZilientHome.jsx src/pages/AudioVault.jsx src/pages/RoleSelect.jsx src/App.jsx src/Layout.jsx src/components/commandCenter/EmergencyCalmMode.jsx --quiet` passes. - `npm run lint` still fails on pre-existing repository-wide lint issues outside the touched files. - `npm run typecheck` still fails on pre-existing repository-wide typecheck issues outside the touched files; no typecheck errors remain for touched files.
pr.author: hasanigordon-afk
